Title: Long, Basil
Overview: Keeper of the Department of Paintings at the Victoria and Albert Museum, and a leading authority on miniatures and early English water-colours. Under his guidence, the Future Director of the Fitzwilliam Museum, Carl Winter, trained.
Archives: • Long, Basil Somerset (1881-1937), Keeper at Victoria and Albert Museum, expert on miniatures, Victoria and Albert Archive of Art and Design. https://discovery.nationalarchives.gov.uk/details/c/F47342, AAD 11-1993.
